tools.name: namespaces.runNamespacesDomainmappingsGet
tools.description: Get information about a domain mapping.

tools.name: namespaces.runNamespacesJobsReplaceJob
tools.description: Replace a job. Only the spec and metadata labels and annotations are modifiable. After the Replace request, Cloud Run will work to make the 'status' match the requested 'spec'. May provide metadata.resourceVersion to enforce update from last read for optimistic concurrency control.

tools.name: namespaces.runNamespacesJobsRun
tools.description: Trigger creation of a new execution of this job.

tools.name: namespaces.runNamespacesServicesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Service. Service creation will trigger a new deployment. Use GetService, and check service.status to determine if the Service is ready.

tools.name: namespaces.runNamespacesServicesDelete
tools.description: Deletes the provided service. This will cause the Service to stop serving traffic and will delete all associated Revisions.

tools.name: namespaces.runNamespacesServicesList
tools.description: Lists services for the given project and region.

tools.name: namespaces.runNamespacesServicesReplaceService
tools.description: Replaces a service. Only the spec and metadata labels and annotations are modifiable. After the Update request, Cloud Run will work to make the 'status' match the requested 'spec'. May provide metadata.resourceVersion to enforce update from last read for optimistic concurrency control.

tools.name: projects.runProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.runProjectsLocationsServicesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Service. Service creation will trigger a new deployment. Use GetService, and check service.status to determine if the Service is ready.

tools.name: projects.runProjectsLocationsServicesDelete
tools.description: Deletes the provided service. This will cause the Service to stop serving traffic and will delete all associated Revisions.

tools.name: projects.runProjectsLocationsServicesGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the IAM Access Control policy currently in effect for the given Cloud Run service. This result does not include any inherited policies.

tools.name: projects.runProjectsLocationsServicesList
tools.description: Lists services for the given project and region.

tools.name: projects.runProjectsLocationsServicesReplaceService
tools.description: Replaces a service. Only the spec and metadata labels and annotations are modifiable. After the Update request, Cloud Run will work to make the 'status' match the requested 'spec'. May provide metadata.resourceVersion to enforce update from last read for optimistic concurrency control.

tools.name: projects.runProjectsLocationsServicesSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the IAM Access control policy for the specified Service. Overwrites any existing policy.

tools.name: projects.runProjectsLocationsServicesTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified Project. There are no permissions required for making this API call.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
